item.title: Whistlin Diesel's 2nd Gen still RIPS!
item.description: Whistlin Diesel's 2nd Gen still works even after everything it's been through

media:content.media:title: Whistlin Diesel's 2nd Gen still RIPS!
media:content.media:description: Whistlin Diesel's 2nd Gen still works even after everything it's been through

item.title: I’m Building TWO 2nd Gen Cummins Trucks At Once
item.description: Working on my second-gen Cummins trucks that both have rough paint and cracked dashes. We start fixing the issues, sanding things down, doing some hands-on work, and getting one of them ready for fresh paint and a cleaner setup. This one should look completely different once it’s done.

media:content.media:title: I’m Building TWO 2nd Gen Cummins Trucks At Once
media:content.media:description: Working on my second-gen Cummins trucks that both have rough paint and cracked dashes. We start fixing the issues, sanding things down, doing some hands-on work, and getting one of them ready for fresh paint and a cleaner setup. This one should look completely different once it’s done.
